narrative:
Swancreek East Two (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,046 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.0%, a modest Republican lean of 3.4 percentage points.
